title: Link and File Column as Custom Action Inputs?
excerpt:

posts.author: kshtjingle (Kshitij Ingle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am trying to make a custom action which will accept a File Column and another one that will accept a Link Column as input in the recipe sentence from the user. However, when selecting the Field Type from the dropdown while configuring the custom action, I see ‘Status Column’, ‘People Column’, ‘Date Column’, etc., but no option for ‘Link Column’, or ‘Files Column’.

How can I go about achieving this?

posts.author: kshtjingle (Kshitij Ingle)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same question. @dipro any input on this?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using a generic column field, and then restrict it to only File columns.

Here’s what the field configuration would look like:
